titleStmt.title: SII 22.190A: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 190A. (A.R. No. 190-A of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, GRĀMAM. ŚIVALŌKANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶADĒVA—10th YEAR.

summary.p: This is incised immediately below No. 190 and gives no introduction to the king. This records a gift of 72 sheep for burning “three fourth” of a perpetual lamp in the temple of Śrī Āṟṟuttaḷi-Mahādēva by Śelvaṉ Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ alias Rājarāja-Periyaraiyaṉ a kuḍippaḷḷi (farmer) of Śevalaimēḍu in Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa maṇḍalam to atone for the death of Mādāni Kuḷattūraṉ of the village, caused by him [unconsciously ?].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . panmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10Āvatu rājentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu ⎯⎯ ṭikkiḻānmur nāṭṭu Ānattūrilirukkum maṉṟāṭi kāḷataṇṭan piccanum kāḷataṇṭaṉ tiruvakattiyum kāḷataṇṭaṉ celvanu
m Immuvom muṭiyūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī bhirandha (parāntaka) śaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyārkkum śrīmāheśvaraṟkum śivabrāhmaṇaṟkum kaiyti ⎯⎯ ricāvatu Ivvūṟk kuṭippaḷḷi mātāni kuḷattūranaiy Aparātattāl jayaṅ koṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu kāliyūrkkoṭṭattu cevalai
meṭṭuk kuṭippaḷḷi celvan paḷḷikoṇṭānāna rājarājapperiyaraiyan koṉṟamaiyil mātāni kuḷattūranukkāka śrī Āṟṟu ⎯⎯ devaṟku śantrādittaval niṉṟeriyakkaṭavatāka vaiytta tirunun=tāviḷakku mukkāl I mukkāl viḷakkālum van=ta cāvāmuvāpperāṭu Eḻupat
tiraṇṭum kaiykkoṇṭu Ikkoyilil civabrāhmaṇar Ātrayan Aiyāṟaṉ vainamika bhaṭṭan Uḷḷiṭṭār vacam yāṇṭu Oṉ ⎯⎯ tāka nāḷ Oṉṟukku ney Ārumoḻitevanāḻiyoṭu Okkum Uḻakkāl ney muppiṭiyāka nāḷ muppatukku ney Aiññāṭuriyāḻākkāka
tiṅkaḷācaṟutiyāka Aṭṭit taravukoḷḷakkaṭavomākavum puraṭṭātit tiṅkaḷ mutal Inney Aṭṭit taravukoḷḷakkaṭavomāka Ivanuk ⎯⎯ ye koṇṭu Ivvūr sabhaiyārkku śrīmāheśvaraṟkku Ikkoyil śivabrāhmaṇar Ātrayan Aiyyāṟṟu vetanāyaka bhaṭṭan
Uḷḷiṭṭārkkum Ivviḷakku mātāni kuḷattūranukkāka celvan paḷḷi koṇṭānāna rājarājap peraiyaṉaik koṇṭu vaiyppittārumākiṟa ⎯⎯ p peri yaraiyan vaippitta viḷakku mukkāl Immukkāl viḷakkālum vanta Āṭu Eḻupat tiraṇṭuṅ kaiykkoṇṭu puraṭṭāti māsam Āca
Digital edition of SII 22.190A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
